title_lines: GILGIT-BALTISTAN ELECTION 2026 — REVISED PREDICTION SUMMARY (28 May 2026)
CORRECTED MODEL: PPP ground momentum upgraded | PML-N federal advantage downgraded | IPP 'turncoat' stigma recognized
Election Date: 7 June 2026 (GBA-24 delayed to 15 Nov 2026)

party_projection.driver: Bilawal-Aseefa campaign, deep Baltistan organization, Shia voter consolidation, progressive Hunza appeal
Federal advantage overstated; struggling with electables per Leopard Media; CM fatigue in Diamer-IV
Persecution narrative mobilizing base MORE than 2020. Symbol ban hurts but core vote intact.
'Turncoat' / 'Gulbar Khan ally' stigma destroying IPP vote. CM Gulbar likely LOSES GBA-18.
Wazir Saleem personal vote + religious network in GBA-9

critical_flips.reason: Aftab Haider's 18-month ground campaign + Bilawal roadshow > Sohail Abbas's fading PTI symbol vote
Nagar reverts to PPP mean without PTI bat symbol. Muhammad Ali Akhter's family legacy + Shia base.
Imran Nadeem's UC network + TLP vote collapse + PPP youth energy > Shigri's biraderi alone.
CM Gulbar Khan LOSES. Anti-IPP sentiment + Malik Kifayat's biraderi + CM fatigue flip this seat.
Mushtaq Hussain's IPP label toxic. 'Doctor vs. turncoat' narrative helps Dr Ashiq Hussain.

government_formation_scenarios.label: Most Likely (65%)
government_formation_scenarios.description: PPP (12) + PML-N (9) = 21 seats | Coalition continues but PPP now SENIOR partner, not junior. Possible PPP CM.

government_formation_scenarios.label: Alternative (25%)
government_formation_scenarios.description: PPP (12) + PTI-backed (3-4) + Independents (2) = 17-18 seats | PPP-led coalition without PML-N. Federal establishment opposes but possible if PTI proxies support.

government_formation_scenarios.label: Chaos (10%)
government_formation_scenarios.description: Hung assembly with heavy independent presence. IPP tries kingmaker role but 'turncoat' stigma limits leverage. Possible post-election defection wave.
